root_text.an4.82:1.1: “Catūhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an4.82:1.3: Musāvādī hoti, pisuṇavāco hoti, pharusavāco hoti, samphappalāpī hoti—
root_text.an4.82:1.4: imehi kho, bhikkhave, catūhi dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an4.82:2.1: Catūhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge.
root_text.an4.82:2.3: Musāvādā paṭivirato hoti, pisuṇāya vācāya paṭivirato hoti, pharusāya vācāya paṭivirato hoti, samphappalāpā paṭivirato hoti—
root_text.an4.82:2.4: imehi kho, bhikkhave, catūhi dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge”ti.

translation_text.an4.82:1.1: “Mendicants, someone with four qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an4.82:1.3: They use speech that’s false, divisive, harsh, or nonsensical.
translation_text.an4.82:1.4: Someone with these four qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an4.82:2.1: Someone with four qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.
translation_text.an4.82:2.3: They don’t use speech that’s false, divisive, harsh, or nonsensical.
translation_text.an4.82:2.4: Someone with these four qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.”
